title: cyanthillium cinereum var. parviflorum
intro: Cyanthillium cinereum var. parviflorum, also known as the small-flowered yellow hair grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Cyanthillium cinereum var. parviflorum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
